task.name: Fix Part 1 Contrast Issues in globals.css
task.action: Modify `src/app/globals.css`. The dark theme needs slightly more contrast. In the `.dark` block: 1) Bump `--card` and `--popover` up to `oklch(0.197 0.009 236.8)` (the secondary-800 value). 2) Bump `--muted` and `--accent` up to `oklch(0.277 0.012 236.8)` (the secondary-700 value). This ensures popovers, dropdowns, and cards are clearly visible against the `--background`.
task.verify: Check `globals.css` `.dark` block. Open a dropdown menu in the app to ensure hover states are now clearly visible distinct slate colors.

task.name: Scrub Raw Utility Colors (Dashboard Components)
task.action: Search through `src/components/dashboard/` for hardcoded color overrides (like `text-red-500`, `bg-red-500/20`, `text-green-500`, `bg-green-500/20`, `bg-secondary-500`). Replace with semantic variables: `text-error-500`, `bg-error-500/20`, `text-success-500`, `bg-success-500/20`, `bg-muted`.
task.verify: Open the dashboard UI and confirm colors map to the softer semantic palette.

task.name: Apply Interactive States & Card Wrappers (Dashboard Components)
task.action: Search through `src/components/dashboard/` for display card elements (like `CreditCardCard`, `AccountCard`). 1) FIRST, if the display card component is missing a background, add standard card classes to its outermost container: `bg-card border rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm`. 2) THEN remove any existing `hover:bg-*`, `hover:border-*`, `hover:-translate-*`, `hover:shadow-*` Tailwind classes. 3) THEN add the `interactive-card` class to the container. Do NOT touch hover effects on buttons, links, or non-card interactive elements.
task.verify: Hover over the dashboard cards. Confirm they have a distinct background color, use surface lightening, and exist inside neat card boundaries.

task.name: Scrub Core Page Layouts
task.action: Audit the main page layout files (`src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/app/accounts/page.tsx`, `src/app/transactions/page.tsx`, `src/app/reports/page.tsx`, `src/app/budgets/page.tsx`). Ensure all top-level container divs use consistent padding (`py-6 px-4 pb-20 md:pb-6`). Remove any hardcoded background/text color mappings that bypass the design system.
task.verify: Navigate between main pages to confirm spacing and colors feel uniform.
